Element Should Be Visible
kw.msg: InvalidSelectorException: Message: invalid selector: Unable to locate an element with the xpath expression ["//div[contains(@class,'date-text') and normalize-space(.)='09']", "//i[contains(@class,'fa-chevron-down')]"] because of the following error: SyntaxError: Failed to execute 'evaluate' on 'Document': The string '["//div[contains(@class,'date-text') and normalize-space(.)='09']", "//i[contains(@class,'fa-chevron-down')]"]' is not a valid XPath expression. (Session info: chrome=136.0.7103.114); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#invalidselectorexception Stacktrace: GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF7C950CF45+75717] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF7C950CFA0+75808] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7C92D8F9A] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7C92E0998] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7C92E3A0C] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7C92E3ADF] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7C932ED77] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7C932F77C] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7C93825A7] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7C93573BF] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7C937F39C] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7C9357153] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7C9320421] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7C93211B3] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF7C980D71D+3223453] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF7C9807CC2+3200322] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF7C9825AF3+3322739] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF7C9526A1A+180890] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF7C952E11F+211359] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF7C9515294+109332] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF7C9515442+109762] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF7C94FBA59+4825] BaseThreadInitThunk [0x00007FFC832B7374+20] RtlUserThreadStart [0x00007FFC83A1CC91+33]
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.
kw.status: InvalidSelectorException: Message: invalid selector: Unable to locate an element with the xpath expression ["//div[contains(@class,'date-text') and normalize-space(.)='09']", "//i[contains(@class,'fa-chevron-down')]"] because of the following error: SyntaxError: Failed to execute 'evaluate' on 'Document': The string '["//div[contains(@class,'date-text') and normalize-space(.)='09']", "//i[contains(@class,'fa-chevron-down')]"]' is not a valid XPath expression. kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Page Should Contain Element
kw.msg: Current page contains element 'xpath=//li[.//div[contains(@class,'date') and normalize-space()='09']]//h4[normalize-space()='Jessica ILM']/ancestor::div[contains(@class,'user-section')][1][.//span[contains(@class,'shift-tme') and normalize-space()='19:00-07:00']]'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.arg: Shift not found for ${DOCTOR_NAME} on ${DATE} with timing ${TIME}
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.doc: Returns the given time in the requested format.

kw.arg: ✅ Shift for Dr.${DOCTOR_NAME} at ${TIME} on ${DATE} found in Doctor Login

kw.arg: COMMENTS=As per email from Dr {name} on {date}.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

test.name: TC2 - Adding shift in Ans roster for gen role
